Déterminer l'ensemble des réels \(x\) tels que
\(wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to wims(append item \ineq to ))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))\)   et   \(\).
Ecrire cet ensemble, s'il n'est pas vide, sous la forme d'un intervalle.
,

Pour désigner l'ensemble vide, écrire vide dans le premier champ de réponse textuel. Pour une borne égale à \(+\infty\), écrire +inf dans le champ de réponse correspondant. Pour une borne égale à \(-\infty\), écrire -inf.
